items.name: Spinach & Artichoke Dip
items.description: Creamy spinach, melted cheeses and artichoke hearts, served with tortilla chips.

items.name: Classic Dip Trio
items.description: Tortilla chips served with our signature spinach & artichoke dip, queso blanco, and fresh salsa.

items.name: Boneless Wings
items.description: Crispy breaded pieces of tender boneless chicken tossed in your choice of sauce.

items.name: Bourbon Street Chicken & Shrimp
items.description: Cajun-seasoned chicken and blackened shrimp in garlic butter, served over sizzling onions and mushrooms with mashed potatoes.

items.name: Fiesta Lime Chicken
items.description: Grilled chicken breast topped with chimichurri sauce, melted cheeses and tortilla strips. Served with Spanish rice and pico de gallo.

items.name: Double Crunch Shrimp
items.description: Crispy battered shrimp served with coleslaw, fries, and cocktail sauce.

items.name: Applebee's Riblets
items.description: Slow-cooked pork riblets tossed in Honey BBQ or Texas Spicy BBQ sauce, served with fries and coleslaw.

items.name: 8 oz. Top Sirloin
items.description: Lightly seasoned, fire-grilled sirloin. Served with green beans and garlicky mashed potatoes.

items.name: Triple Chocolate Meltdown
items.description: Warm, rich, fudge-filled chocolate cake drizzled with hot fudge and topped with vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Sizzlin' Caramel Apple Blondie
items.description: Warm apple, nuts, and butter pecan blondie served sizzling with ice cream and caramel sauce.
